scripts.install:all: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n front,back -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run start:dev"
scripts.build:full: npm run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.verify:all: npm run test:coverage && npm --prefix backend run test:e2e && npm run build:full
